name: Plumbing Rough-In Pipeline
description: Eight-step plumbing pipeline strung from existing commands: build the plumbing seed family -> place fixtures from room rules -> auto-drop cold/hot/soil from every fixture connector + penetration sweep -> size drainage -> trap/vent audit -> backflow audit -> stack capacity check -> full validator suite. Select the target rooms before launching; PlaceFixturesCommand leaves the placed fixtures selected so AutoDropCommand (AutoPipeDrop) routes them in the next step with no manual re-selection. NOTE: step field names are commandTag/label to match the WorkflowStep POCO ([JsonProperty]); 'command'/'name'/'skipIfFamilyLoaded' do NOT bind and produce a dead workflow. Every commandTag below resolves in WorkflowEngine.ResolveCommand.

steps.label: Build plumbing seed family
steps._notes: Generates STING_SEED_PlumbingFixture.rfa with 3-connector union (DCW/DHW/Sanitary) so AutoPipeDrop has terminals to wire to. protectExisting=true, so re-runs are safe. Seeds_Build builds all 16 seed families; the plumbing fixture seed is one of them.

steps.label: Place fixtures from room rules
steps._notes: FixturePlacementEngine reads STING_PLACEMENT_RULES + room types. WC / basin / shower / urinal / sink land at the right wall positions per BS 6465. On live placement PlaceFixturesCommand calls Selection.SetElementIds(placedIds) so the next step sees them selected.

steps.label: Auto-drop pipes (cold + hot + soil)
steps._notes: AutoDropCommand groups the selection by discipline; Plumbing fixtures dispatch to AutoPipeDrop, which runs once per fixture connector (2-3 drops per WC/basin/sink). Also triggers SlabPenetrationDetector + WallPenetrationDetector + BeamPenetrationDetector + FrpPenetrationPlacer in the same transaction.

steps.label: Auto-size drainage (BS EN 12056-2 / IPC 2021)
steps._notes: AutoSizeDrainageCommand: DfuMap -> DrainageSizer -> VentDesigner -> SlopeAutoCorrector. Sets DN on each soil run.

steps.label: Run full validator suite
steps._notes: Includes PenetrationCoverageValidator so any plumbing run that crossed a fire-rated barrier without a placed FRP shows up in the dashboard.
